message:
docs: fix scenario variable, WEC link, marketplace page (#1430, #1432, #1433) (#1437)

- Replace hardcoded "cluster1" in Scenario 4 BindingPolicy with
  $label_query_one variable, matching the convention used by all other
  scenarios
- Replace unreleased-development URL in WEC registration page with
  relative link to get-started guide
- Add fetch timeout, retry button, and GitHub fallback link to
  marketplace page to prevent permanent loading state

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
